case_title: URBAN PACIFIC PROPERTIES, INC. VS. AMELIA RESTUA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RESTUA, AMELIA

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-25-2017 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT AMELIA RESTUA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE.
